rationale: Termination set (EVAL-R7): two fixtures driving the PRODUCTION graph. A perpetually-insufficient-coverage run MUST terminate at the reflection_count bound; a perpetually-failing-to-ground (always-regenerate) run MUST terminate at the redraft_count bound. Both end DEGRADED — never an unbounded loop, never an error/budget_exceeded.

cases.rationale: Gaps never close -> the reflection budget is spent to MAX_REFLECTIONS then the run degrades.
The grounder always asks to REGENERATE -> the redraft budget is spent to MAX_REDRAFTS then the run degrades.
